prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Suzuki M13A** (1.3L, 4-cylinder, 16V, 91hp stock) from the Suzuki Swift Sport (ZC31S), retaining the Matiz's original **F10D** engine mounts with custom fabricated brackets (e.g., **Custom Cages** laser-cut steel mounts) for direct bolt-in compatibility. The M13A will be paired with a **K&N 57-0030** high-flow conical air filter and a **HKS Hi-Power** 4-2-1 stainless steel header (modified to fit the Matiz's compact engine bay) to optimize exhaust scavenging.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT12** turbocharger (specifically the **GT1241** variant, sized for the M13A's 1.3L displacement) mounted on a **Custom Cages** turbo manifold, paired with a **Tial 38mm** wastegate and a **GReddy Type-S** front-mount intercooler (modified to fit the Matiz's front bumper support structure). Fueling will be handled by **Denso 195cc** high-impedance injectors and a **Walbro 255 LPH** in-tank fuel pump, controlled by a **Haltech Elite 1000** standalone ECU with a **Bosch LSU 4.9** wideband O2 sensor for precise AFR tuning.

Suspension overhaul using **Ohlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers (custom valved for the Matiz's 850kg curb weight) with **SuperPro** polybushings for the front control arms and rear trailing arms. The braking system will be upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (from the Fiat Panda 100HP) on the front, paired with **DBA 4000 Series** slotted rotors (256mm diameter, modified to fit the Matiz's 4x100 PCD) and **Ferodo DS2500** high-friction pads. The rear will retain the stock drums but will be reinforced with **Wilwood** brake proportioning valve for balanced stopping power.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (modified to fit the Matiz's 3,495mm length and 1,495mm width) with **custom fiberglass overfenders** to accommodate the **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 15x8 ET0 wheels (4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Toyo R888R** 185/50R15 tires. The kit will include a **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (designed in-house using **3D scanning** of the Matiz's bumper) and a **Maxton Design** rear diffuser with integrated **DTM-style** exhaust outlets for the HKS header.

Custom **Varis-style** carbon fiber hood (fabricated by **Seibon Carbon**) with a **functional central vent** to aid engine bay heat extraction, paired with **Depo Racing** JDM-style clear headlights (modified with **Morimoto H1 HID projectors** and **Philips D1S bulbs**) and **Rally Armor** black polyurethane mudflaps (custom-cut for the Matiz's wheelbase). The side mirrors will be replaced with **NRG Innovations** carbon fiber **Mini GT** mirrors for a sleeker profile.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro SRD** bucket seats (modified to fit the Matiz's narrow cabin) mounted on **Sparco** bolt-in seat rails, paired with a **MOMO Mod.78** flat-bottom steering wheel (350mm diameter) and a **Defi BF** 1.5-gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, and water temp) mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod**. The rear seats will be removed and replaced with a **custom aluminum flat floor** (fabricated by **Custom Cages**) to reduce weight and improve rigidity.
